items.name: Victor’s Chicken Bacon Ranch
items.desc: Grilled chicken, crispy turkey bacon, melted American cheese, sautéed peppers and onions, lettuce, tomato, and banana peppers. Finished with mayo and creamy ranch or chipotle ranch. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: The Chopped Sweet and Savory Vic
items.desc: Chopped steak with crispy turkey bacon, grilled onions, cheddar cheese, jalapeños, and a bold BBQ + ranch blend. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Victor’s NYC Chopped Cheese
items.desc: Juicy ground beef chopped with yellow American cheese, topped with lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles. Served with Big Vic Sauce. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Victor’s Spicy Chipotle Chicken
items.desc: Chopped grilled chicken with pepper jack cheese, grilled peppers and onions, hot giardiniera, lettuce, and tomato. Finished with mayo and chipotle ranch. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Victor’s Chopped Philly Cheesesteak
items.desc: Classic chopped steak with grilled onions and peppers, smothered in creamy nacho cheese and finished with a sauce of your choosing. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Victor’s Smoked BBQ Chicken
items.desc: BBQ glazed grilled chicken breast with turkey bacon, pepper jack, grilled peppers and onions, lettuce, tomato, and pickles, finished with a sauce of your choosing. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Victor’s Impossible Chopped Cheese
items.desc: Impossible burger patty chopped with yellow American cheese, topped with lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles. Served with Big Vic Sauce. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Victor’s Chopped Impossible Philly
items.desc: Impossible burger patty with grilled onions, mixed peppers, and creamy nacho cheese. Finished with a sauce of your choosing. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Victor’s Chopped Chicken Philly
items.desc: Seasoned chicken with grilled mixed peppers, onions, and nacho cheese. Finished with a sauce of your choosing. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Victor’s Cajun Heat
items.desc: Spicy buffalo chicken with pepper jack cheese, grilled onions, mixed peppers, jalapeño, lettuce, tomato, and banana peppers. Sauced with Victor’s Zesty Sauce. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Niraj’s Famous Butter Chicken
items.desc: Specialty sandwich. Rich creamy tomato-based butter chicken sauce with warm spices, a hint of sweetness, mozzarella, and fried onion. Paneer substitute available. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Victor’s Honey Turkey Bacon
items.desc: Smoked turkey and turkey bacon glazed in honey mustard, layered with American cheese, lettuce, tomato, and red onions.

items.name: Victor’s Triple Turkey Club
items.desc: Roasted turkey, roast beef, and turkey bacon with American cheese, lettuce, tomato, pickles, and onions. Finished with Victor’s Gold Sauce and mayo.

items.name: Victor’s Veggie Special
items.desc: Swiss cheese, lettuce, tomato, avocado, onions, spinach, green peppers, jalapeños, pickles, banana peppers, black olives, cucumber, and giardiniera. Topped with mayo and chipotle ranch, finished with a sauce of your choosing.

items.name: Victor’s Classic Turkey Sandwich
items.desc: Fresh-sliced turkey breast layered with crisp lettuce, tomato, and red onions. Finished with mayo and your choice of mustard.

items.name: Victor’s Roast Beef Deluxe
items.desc: Juicy roast beef layered with provolone cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles. Finished with mayo and Victor’s Gold Sauce.

items.name: Victor’s Chicken Deluxe
items.desc: Fresh chicken breast stacked with provolone cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles. Finished with mayo and Victor’s signature house sauce.

items.name: The Classic Victor Panini
items.desc: Golden sourdough pressed with layers of oven-roasted turkey, melted mozzarella, and crispy turkey bacon. Finished with Victor’s Gold Sauce and garlic buttered parsley. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: Garlic Chicken Bacon Panini
items.desc: Sliced chicken stacked with turkey bacon and loads of melted mozzarella, pressed into golden sourdough. Finished with creamy garlic mayo and a sauce of your choosing. Finished with garlic buttered parsley. Comes with complimentary kettle Cajun chips and sour cream.

items.name: The Double Smash Panini
items.desc: Two smashed beef patties layered with melted American cheese and grilled onions, pressed hot into crispy sourdough. Finished with Big Vic Sauce.

items.name: BBQ Chicken Panini
items.desc: Sliced chicken with melted American cheese and grilled onions, pressed on sourdough and finished with a smoky BBQ glaze.

items.name: Garlic Veggie Melt
items.desc: Grilled mushrooms, mozzarella, grilled onions, spinach, grilled peppers, avocado, garlic mayo, and chipotle ranch on toasted panini bread.

items.name: The Impossible Double Panini
items.desc: Two smashed Beyond patties layered with melted American cheese and grilled onions, pressed hot into crispy sourdough. Finished with Big Vic Sauce.

items.name: Niraj’s Famous Butter Chicken Panini
items.desc: Specialty panini with rich creamy tomato-based butter chicken sauce, mozzarella, and fried onion. Paneer substitute available.

items.name: Victor’s Classic Double
items.desc: Two juicy beef patties stacked with two slices of yellow American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles. Finished with Big Vic Sauce. Comes with a complimentary pickle.

items.name: Victor’s Fantastic 4
items.desc: A monster burger with four beef patties, two slices of yellow American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles. Served with Big Vic Sauce. Comes with a complimentary pickle.

items.name: Victor’s Rise & Shine
items.desc: Two beef patties with two slices of yellow American cheese, lettuce, fried egg, turkey bacon, tomato, avocado, and onions. Served with Big Vic Sauce. Comes with a complimentary pickle.

items.name: Victor’s Double Bacon
items.desc: Two beef patties layered with crispy turkey bacon, two slices of yellow American cheese, lettuce, tomato, pickles, and onions. Finished with Big Vic Sauce. Comes with a complimentary pickle.

items.name: Victor’s Onion Overload Burger
items.desc: Two patties topped with crispy fried onion rings, two slices of yellow American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles. Sauced with Big Vic Sauce. Comes with a complimentary pickle.

items.name: Victor’s Veggie Burger
items.desc: Two grilled Beyond patties topped with pepper jack cheese, jalapeño, lettuce, tomato, pickles, avocado, and onions. Finished with Big Vic Sauce. Comes with a complimentary pickle.

items.name: Victor’s Backyard BBQ
items.desc: Two beef patties smothered in BBQ sauce, two slices of yellow American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles. Sauced with Victor’s Ranch. Comes with a complimentary pickle.

items.name: Niraj’s Famous Butter Chicken Burger
